zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Adélaïde De Crécy於1027年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉時，她的父親Hugues d'Alluyes III19歲，母親Richilde De Chateau la Valliere20歲。她和Bouchard de Corbeil II至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1104年10月12日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯古內艾-素-馬內享年77歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countess Adélaïde De Crécy于1027年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉时，她的父亲Hugues d'Alluyes III19岁，母亲Richilde De Chateau la Valliere20岁。她和Bouchard de Corbeil II至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1104年10月12日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯古內艾-素-馬內享年77岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Crécy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Creasey
meanings: English (Lincolnshire, or Norman origin): habitational name from Cressy in Seine-Maritime, France (see   Cressy  ).
Possibly an Americanized form of any of the German names mentioned at   Creasy  .

nameMeanings.name: Adélaïde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Adélaïde De Crécy was born in 1027, in Falaise, Calvados, Normandy, France, her father, Hugues d'Alluyes III, was 19 and her mother, Richilde De Chateau la Valliere, was 20. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Bouchard de Corbeil II. She died on 12 October 1104, in Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 77, and was buried in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Adélaïde De Crécy est née en 1027, à Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Hugues d'Alluyes III, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Richilde De Chateau la Valliere, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Bouchard de Corbeil II. Elle est décédée le 12 octobre 1104, à Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Adélaïde De Crécy 1027 in Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues d'Alluyes III 19 und ihre Mutter Richilde De Chateau la Valliere 20. Sie hatte mit Bouchard de Corbeil II mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Oktober 1104 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Adélaïde De Crécy è nata il nel 1027 nel Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Hugues d'Alluyes III, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Richilde De Chateau la Valliere, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Bouchard de Corbeil II. Morì il 12 ottobre 1104, nel Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Adélaïde De Crécyが1027年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスファレイゼで生まれた時，父Hugues d'Alluyes IIIは19歳，母Richilde De Chateau la Valliereは20歳であった。彼女はBouchard de Corbeil IIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1104年10月12日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-サイント-デニスゴウルナイ-スル-マルンで77歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアウマルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Adélaïde De Crécy(이)가 1027년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 팔레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues d'Alluyes III(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richilde De Chateau la Valliere(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Bouchard de Corbeil II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1104년 10월 12일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-세인트-데니스 고우른아이-수-마니에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 오마일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Adélaïde De Crécy nasceu em 1027, em Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Hugues d'Alluyes III, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Richilde De Chateau la Valliere, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Bouchard de Corbeil II. Ela faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1104, em Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, França, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Adélaïde De Crécy родилась в 1027 г. в местности фалеис, калвадос, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues d'Alluyes III было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Richilde De Chateau la Valliere, 20. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Bouchard de Corbeil II. Она умерла 12 октября 1104 г. в местности гоурнеи-сур-марн, сине-сеинт-денис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности аумеил, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Adélaïde De Crécy nació en 1027, en Falaise, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hugues d'Alluyes III, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Richilde De Chateau la Valliere, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Bouchard de Corbeil II. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1104, en Gournay-sur-Marne, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
